description:
Operationalize retention/deletion policy for the lean DynamoDB/Cognito/MDI/Stripe architecture.

**Scope**
- Create `docs/compliance/retention-policy.md` for Cognito accounts, DynamoDB linkage/status/evidence records, webhook idempotency records, consent evidence, billing records, logs, and provider-held clinical records.
- Define deletion/tombstone behavior for Apoth records while recognizing MDI and Stripe have their own retention/legal obligations.
- Implement any required DynamoDB TTLs or scheduled Lambda sweeps.
- Avoid raw webhook payload or KYC document retention paths unless future decisions reintroduce them.

**Acceptance**
- Policy is reviewed with T-028/T-077 legal work.
- TTL/sweep behavior is tested for records eligible for deletion.
- Patient deletion/support runbook clearly separates Apoth, MDI, and Stripe responsibilities.
title: Retention and deletion policy implementation
